violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. PIC stated establishment will change to bleach until dispenser is at adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Shrimp and cooked cut vegetables were observed held below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product was reheated. Both pans were observed double panned. Establishment switched to single pans at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The 3-bay sink was observed with a leak. Leak to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The door to the downstairs toilet room next to dry storage is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The establishment was observed non-continuously cooking (partial cooking) chicken and beef at time of inspection. The establishment does not have approval for this procedure at this time. Establishment is to submit a formal request for approval to continue this procedure. Please see remarks for further information. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed in back storage area, ware-washing area, and throughout the basement storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to clean droppings and monitor for activity. Pest control to be increased in frequency if needed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Sauce (containing tomato, pepper, onion, and garlic), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Several open bags of rodenticide were observed being used throughout the basement food storage areas. Rodent bait shall be contained in a covered, tamper-resistant bait station. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 500 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The establishment was observed non-continuously cooking (partial cooking) chicken at time of inspection. The establishment does not have approval for this procedure at this time. Establishment is to submit a formal request for approval to continue this procedure. Please see remarks for further information. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
The plumbing under the three bay sink was observed in poor repair (heavy leak when draining sanitizer bay). New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Various food product was observed held at (48-54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Raw meats were moved to colder refrigeration units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Several insect glue strips were observed in basement with an accumulation of trapped insects. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Walk in cooler located in the back kitchen area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Unit was being serviced during inspection. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until it reaches proper ambient temperatures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
